parameters.query:
with input_data as (
    select
        '{{ $json.rowsJson.replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb as data
),

rows as (
    select *
    from input_data i,
    jsonb_to_recordset(i.data) as x(
        rate_date date,
        currency_code text,
        usd_rate numeric,
        source text
    )
)

insert into moneytrack.exchange_rates_usd
    (rate_date, currency_code, usd_rate, source)
select
    rate_date,
    currency_code,
    usd_rate,
    source
from rows
on conflict (rate_date, currency_code)
do update set
    usd_rate = excluded.usd_rate,
    source = excluded.source,
    created_at = now();
